code: import{signInWithEmailAndPassword,signOut}from"firebase/auth";import{auth}from"../firebase";export const loginUser=async(email,password)=>{try{const userCredential=await signInWithEmailAndPassword(auth,email,password);return{user:userCredential.user,error:null};}catch(error){return{user:null,error:error.message};}};export const logoutUser=async()=>{try{await signOut(auth);}catch(error){console.error("Error signing out:",error);}};
